ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( ISCHANGED(StageName), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Send To Order Management"), OR ( ISPICKVAL(Payment_Type__c, ""), ISPICKVAL( Is_software_on_this_order__c , ""), ISPICKVAL( Training_on_PO__c , ""), ISPICKVAL( Are_services_products_on_this_order__c , ""), ISPICKVAL( Are_hardware_products_on_this_order__c , "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage:
Go to the Order Management tab and ensure the following fields are populated:
1. Payment Type 2. Is software on this order? 3. Are training products on this order? 4. Are services products on this order? 5. Are hardware products on this order?
